top_visible_issues: No website found, meaning the business has no discoverable online presence for potential customers searching locally.
No Google Business listing identified, limiting visibility in local search and map results.
Without an online presence, the business is unable to capture booking interest, display opening hours, or showcase its menu to new customers.
outreach_hook: Example Cafe currently has no website or Google Business listing, which means customers searching for cafes in Westport are unlikely to find them online. A professionally built website paired with a Google Business profile could meaningfully increase their local visibility and footfall. We help hospitality businesses in Ireland establish a strong, conversion-ready online presence quickly and affordably.
